title: XIFT v1.0 Extension: provenance
description: Derivation lineage of a knowledge artifact (parents, operation, strata, anonymization evidence). Source: xift-1.0-spec-extension-provenance.md §2, §3.

parent_ids.x-xift-note: Empty array = leaf artifact. maxItems is lineage_chain_max (10, core §10).

anonymization_evidence.x-xift-note: Conditionally REQUIRED when derivation_type=redaction AND the envelope transitions pii_classification from personal-identifiable/pseudonymized to anonymized (provenance §3.2; core §9.4). That transition depends on the parent envelope's PII state, which is not visible to this schema; enforce in code. Insufficient/rejected evidence yields policy:provenance:anonymization_evidence_insufficient (204). Note: evaluation_timestamp is OPTIONAL per spec.

evaluation_signature.description: Ed25519 signature by evaluator_did over the JCS-canonical attestation (base64url, not the prefixed-hex hash form).
